ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Double Axle, Upright Arcade, Taitio 1990
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Double Axle (Taito, 1990) Price: $375 Bring home a piece of arcade racing history! This is an original Double Axle upright cabinet from Taito (1990). Known for its rugged off-road truck racing gameplay, Double Axle puts players behind the wheel of massive monster trucks, battling through dirt tracks, jumps, and obstacles. It’s a rare find that captures the excitement of 90s arcade culture. Condition: - Cabinet is original and shows its age — it needs some love. - Monitor has been converted to LCD. - Lights power on. - Sound is present. - Game plays and works! Highlights: - Classic Taito racing arcade with unique monster truck gameplay. - LCD conversion makes it easier to maintain. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a collection. - A working cabinet from 1990 — not something you see every day. Important: - Price is negotiable, but only slightly. - Sold as-is. - Serious buyers only. No I don’t deliver but it can be picked up or shipped (arranged by buyer) in Powder Springs, GA.

ads.title: Hobby pinball machine Stern - split second 1980's ready to restore $500
ads.description: Hobby project...needs some tender care!! Great pinball game. Stern/Bally Split second has all the parts and schematic...Power supply needs replaced and redo all the rubbers!bumpers. Other than that it was working... $500 or best offer...located in Athens just off the Loop.

ads.author: Rocky Pal
ads.title: Pair Daytona USA 2 Battle On The Edge Sit Down Arcade Machines
ads.description: Machine on the left works properly, can use a new flyback for brighter picture or adjustment, works fine. Everything works as it should. Coin chutes not used/tested on both machines. Machine on the right needs some work. It is also on Battle On The Edge and I have successfully had it in slave mode and linked but the force feedback on the machine does not work properly is very week. The screen is nice. I have extra parts even boards from a working machine that haven't tried replacing yet. Not the stack, the ones related to feedback. If this is your things, easy. I have a good 4 button panel for second machine as well. Will require some disassembly to get out the door.

ads.author: Dylan Vice
ads.title: Ice fever pinball machine (gottlieb,1985)
ads.description: The machine is not working so it’s for parts or to repair. I do not have a way to transport it so you would have to be able to pick it up. The price is not firm. Very open to offers so don’t be afraid to ask.

ads.author: Rick Edwards
ads.title: Space Invaders arcade game
ads.description: Original arcade game from the early 1980’s. Has. Been in climate control storage for 15 years. Worked when I put it away but it is not powering up now. Take it as is. Located in Arlington.

ads.author: Matt Drowne
ads.title: Arkanoid Supertop Arcaid Game
ads.description: 1986 Taito Arkanoid Supertop video game. Game works great and powers up. I just turned it on before posting. There are a couple wear marks and peeling along the edge but game its self is great. The white one player button does need to be replaced. Game does have a free play button installed from before I purchased it. Looking for $750 OBO. I can not ship. If it is posted it is available. This comes as is.

ads.author: Robert Stotts
ads.title: Classic Shinobi Full Size Arcade Game
ads.description: This is a full size original Shinobi arcade game. Fully functional and working. It has the original PCB motherboard and I have installed an eprom conversion kit to prevent it from not playing anymore after a certain amount of plays, but I also still have the original EPROMs in case you want to convert it back. I also have the original PCB motherboards for Aliens and Robocop if you are interested. in that as well.

ads.author: Joey Richard

ads.description: This Big Buc Hunter is fully operational and location ready. If you’re looking for a passive source of income are a item for your mancave, then this could be the perfect addition. Please reach out as this unit will not last long!

ads.author: Rocky Pal
ads.title: Williams Stargate Playing Blind Updated
ads.description: Moved to a different room and started playing blind. Also noticed Marquee not lit now so hoping as easy as the ac line to it. I will pull out and can make video with sound, etc just wanted to get it out there in case. It's been 5 years or so but control panel is excellent overlay, the board was shopped out with the old ram removed and replaced with the industry standard as well as newer style arcade power supply to avoid the original mcr problems. Original stick and buttons. Any questions just ask.

ads.author: Preston Burt
ads.title: Vintage Capcom MAGIC SWORD Arcade Game (1990)
ads.description: Selling a vintage MAGIC SWORD arcade game by Capcom. This game was assembled from a New Old Stock (NOS) Kit by local resto expert (Mitch N) around 2015. The monitor is also a NOS monitor with maybe 250 hours on it total. The only thing missing on this is the clear plexiglass over the monitor and bezel, but since it's in my private home collection, it isn't a big deal to me. Game is available for ground-level pickup at my home in Gainesville, GA 30506. Asking $1,000 OBO and I'm open to trades.

ads.author: Mark Herring
ads.title: Gorf arcade project cab, not working. Hammond, La.
ads.description: Ad put up 2-17-26, 2:25pm. If ad still up, it's still available. Will not ship. Will not deliver. Located Hammond, La. 70401. I have a non working Gorf arcade project. It was converted to a Wheel of Fortune game so no Gorf boards present but it seems like all original Gorf wiring still in the game. It's a 4600 tube but does not have the chassis to go with it. Looks like the Gorf side art is still there but painted over in black. I removed wheel of fortune cpo to reveal the Gorf cpo.

ads.author: John Russo
ads.title: World Rally driving arcade game
ads.description: Nice upright driving game for most any application. Monitor has been replaced with a brand new LCD. Game works 100% can arrange local delivery nationwide shipping always willing to take coin operated trades.

ads.author: Robert Long
ads.title: Lethal enforcers 2 arcade cabinet
ads.description: This is for a lethal enforcers part 2, gunfighters arcade machine. It works, pretty much fine. The monitor has some issues. It needs to be recapped. But it plays just fine. The player two gun I can't get to connect. But I think it's because it's missing the optical lens on it. Not sure how it came out. But it was missing, when I got the machine. The game will let you play all the way through, just fine. But the screen has what they call monitor fog appearing on one side. The coin mechs work fine. Everything is all there. It has a brand new power supply, put in it.
